message:
docs(readme): add Homebrew and Scoop package manager installation options

Add alternative installation methods via Homebrew (macOS/Linux) and
Scoop (Windows) package managers for users who prefer managed installs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -17,6 +17,17 @@ curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_syste | bash -s -- --easy-mode --verify ``` +**Or via package managers:** + +```bash +# macOS/Linux (Homebrew) +brew install dicklesworthstone/tap/cm + +# Windows (Scoop) +scoop bucket add dicklesworthstone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket +scoop install dicklesworthstone/cm +``` + ---
